mapper.update:
UPDATE t_question
type = #{type}, content = #{content}, image = #{image}, option_a = #{optionA}, option_b = #{optionB}, option_c = #{optionC}, option_d = #{optionD}, answer = #{answer}, explanation = #{explanation}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, category = #{category}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND
